# Secret scanner fixture corpus

The deterministic fixture corpus is generated by `src/scanner/fixtureData.ts` and exercised by `bin/run-fixture-scan.sh`.
It contains 20 fake provider-shaped true positives and 80 safe lookalikes/allowlisted examples.

Scanner findings must only emit HMAC fingerprints and redacted excerpts; raw fixture values must not appear in findings, logs, or snapshots.
